questions.q: On April 27, 2026, the Institute of Science and Technology Austria (ISTA) published a study in Nature Communications showing that after birth, the brain's hippocampal neural network transitions from what state?
options: Dense and random to sparser and refined
Sparser and refined to dense and random
questions.correctText: Dense and random to sparser and refined

questions.q: According to business reports published on April 27, 2026, Foreign Institutional Investors (FIIs) pulled what massive amount from the Indian market during an 18-month selling spree?
On April 27, 2026, Intellia Therapeutics reported topline data from its Phase 3 HAELO clinical trial. This milestone marks the world's first Phase 3 readout for what type of candidate?
options: An in vivo CRISPR gene editing candidate
questions.correctText: An in vivo CRISPR gene editing candidate

questions.q: The FBI is seeking the public's help to find Alejandro Jacomino Gonzalez in connection with the hijacking of a car hauler that stopped in which Florida county?

options: 100th anniversary of the US-UK special relationship
